title: Implement NVM failure (OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED) handling with SSN rollback or safe advance in oscore_protect_request
description: After SSN increment, if oscore_ctx_persist_ssn returns OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED, either decrement sender_seq under mutex to rollback or advance SSN to a safe value (e.g. next power of 2 or max). Prevent nonce reuse risk. Update oscore.c error paths. See persist_ssn and atomic block at 1418-1444.
